title: Shōwa no Gurazeni Ends 10th Part, Returns in Fall
content: This year's combined 22nd and 23rd issue of Kodansha 's Morning magazine published the 90th chapter of Shōwa no Gurazeni , Kawa 's spinoff of Yūji Moritaka and Keiji Adachi 's Gurazeni: Dai League-hen ( Gurazeni Big League Arc) manga, on Thursday.
author: ANN

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Opens at #1 in Japan, Sound! Euphonium, The Final Movie Part 1 Anime Opens at #4
content: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie — Nintendo , Illumination, and Universal Pictures ' sequel to The Super Mario Bros. Movie — opened at #1 at the Japanese box office. The film sold 1.121 million tickets and earned 1,601,093,600 yen (about US$9.96 million) in its first three days.
author: ANN

title: 10 Best Anime to Binge on Crunchyroll in May 2026
content: The first month of the highly anticipated Spring 2026 anime season is finally over after premiering an exciting lineup of some of the most exciting series ever. The season marked the return of some of their favorite shows, including Dr.
author: ComicBook

title: Godzilla Minus One Roars Back to Life With Major Revival Thanks to Sequel Hype
content: Godzilla Minus Zero is set to take the world by storm later this year, expanding on the film that helped the kaiju universe earn its first Academy Award. Even though the last time we saw this take on the King of the Monsters was in the ocean’s depths, blown to pieces by Japan’s last-ditch attempt to defeat the kaiju,…
author: ComicBook

title: Keishi Ayasato's Hitokui Oni no Hanayome Manga Ends
content: This year's 12th issue of Kodansha 's ARTEMIS by sirius magazine published the final chapter of Keishi Ayasato 's Hitokui Oni no Hanayome ( The Bride of the Man-Eating Demon ) manga on Thursday. The fourth and final compiled book volume will ship on May 29.
author: ANN

title: Legendary Director Don Bluth Shoots Down Rumors Surrounding Classic Film
content: All Dogs Go To Heaven might have been released in theaters in the late 1980s, but the classic animated film is still making the rounds to this day. This is, in part, thanks to the tragic subject matter of the film, the animation style, and its classic characters that resonate to this day.
author: ComicBook

title: Miko Yasu Launches DanDon Manga Spinoff
content: The combined 22nd and 23rd issue of Kodansha 's Morning magazine announced on Thursday that Miko Yasu will launch a spinoff to DanDon titled SagaDon in the next issue on May 14. The title will run for five chapters.
author: ANN

title: Music Awards Japan Nominates Kenshi Yonezu's 'Iris Out,' Sakanaction's 'Kaiju,' AiNA THE END's 'On The Way' for Best Song
content: The Japan Culture and Entertainment Industry Promotion Association (CEIPA) announced on Thursday the nominees for its inaugural Music Awards Japan event . The awards nominated Kenshi Yonezu 's "IRIS OUT" (from Chainsaw Man – The Movie: Reze Arc ), sakanaction 's "Kaiju" (from Orb: On the Movements of the Earth ), and…
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Modulo Gets Anime Trailer by MAPPA for Final Volume
content: Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo ( Jujutsu Kaisen ≡ ) got a special anime trailer by MAPPA to commemorate the release of its final volume, Volume 3. Season 4 of the main anime, subtitled Culling Game Arc Part 2, was recently announced.
author: Anime Corner

title: Popolocrois Story Manga Author Yousuke Tamori Dies at 74
content: The official website of the Japan Cartoonists Association announced on April 20 that manga author Yousuke Tamori had died on April 10. He was 74. A private funeral attended by family members was held, in accordance with Tamori's wishes. Tamori's personal website has also posted an announcement regarding his death.
author: ANN
